data.title: PharmAla issues financial statements for Year End 2025 and Q1 2026, highlighting customer deposits growth. Full details on company website. CEO aims to start Phase 2a/b clinical trial in Australia, sees rising demand for LaNeo MDMA.
data.description: PharmAla Biotech Holdings Inc., a biotechnology company, has recently filed its financial results for the periods ending August 31, 2025, and November 30, 2025. The company is focused on the research, development, and manufacturing of LaNeo™ MDMA and novel derivatives of MDMA. They are moving towards developing new molecules with the goal of commencing a Phase 2a/b clinical trial in Australia. There has been a growth in demand for LaNeo™ MDMA, with customer deposits rising to $276k by year-end 2025 compared to $209k in 2024. In Q1 2026, deposits increased to $433k. Reimbursement approvals for medical treatments in Australia are expected to further boost sales. Full financial details can be accessed on the company's website and SEDAR profile page.

data.title: Flow brand separates from manufacturing, becomes brand-led business. Cizzle Brands buys manufacturing, Rucker Investments retains minority stake.
data.description: Flow will function as a brand-led business following the acquisition of manufacturing operations by Cizzle Brands Corporation. Rucker Investments will continue to hold a minority stake in the manufacturing business while retaining sole ownership of the Flow brand. This development was confirmed on December 24, 2025, in Toronto. The transition signifies a strategic shift in operations, with significant implications for the stakeholders involved.

data.title: Gilead buys Repare Therapeutics cancer asset RP-3467 for $30 million, aims to enhance oncology research.
data.description: Gilead Sciences Inc. (NASDAQ: GILD) has agreed to purchase Repare Therapeutics Inc.'s (NASDAQ: RPTX) polymerase theta (Polθ) ATPase inhibitor, RP-3467. The drug is currently in the POLAR Phase 1 trial, studying its safety, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, and preliminary activity either alone or combined with olaparib in adults with various cancers. Gilead emphasized their expertise in oncology research and development coupled with RP-3467's potential as a top Polθ ATPase inhibitor. Detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Teva's S&P credit rating upgraded to 'BB+' and Moody's outlook revised to positive, reaching investment-grade status.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 24, 2025, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE and TASE: TEVA) revealed that S&P Global Ratings has boosted Teva’s long-term issuer credit rating to ‘BB+’ from ‘BB’, maintaining a stable outlook. Moody's Ratings Agency also affirmed Teva's B1a rating and changed the outlook to positive from stable. These developments signify a notable advancement for Teva in its pursuit of attaining investment-grade standing.

data.title: Mynd.ai collaborates with Q101 Foundation, working towards finalizing a strategic Memorandum of Understanding.Char 100
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Mynd.ai, Inc. (NYSE American: MYND), a renowned global provider of interactive classroom technology, revealed its collaboration with the Q101 Foundation. As part of this partnership, Mynd's subsidiary, Promethean, is in the process of formalizing a strategic Memorandum of Understanding. This initiative aims to further strengthen their commitment to enhancing educational experiences.

data.title: Eastern International Ltd. signed a contract for a photovoltaic project worth RMB 42.5 million ($6.04 million).
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on December 24, 2025, Eastern International Ltd. (NASDAQ: ELOG), a leading provider of domestic and cross-border professional logistic services such as project logistic and general logistic for company clients, made an announcement.

data.title: M2i Global and Volato Group release year-end shareholder update, outlining achievements in 2025.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.1%, marking a significant improvement from the previous quarter. This drop in unemployment is a positive sign for the economy as more people are finding jobs. Additionally, the stock market saw a substantial increase, with the main index rising by 500 points to reach a new record high. This surge in the stock market reflects growing investor confidence and optimism about the future economic outlook. Overall, these indicators suggest a strengthening economy with lower unemployment rates and a booming stock market.

data.title: Trump Admin ignoring economists' warnings about A.I. risks, downplaying job loss & financial bubble concerns as stock prices rise.
data.description: The concerns raised, ranging from mass job losses to a potential financial bubble, have been minimized by the administration while President Trump celebrates the significant increases in stock prices and faster economic growth.

data.title: Angola construction industry output to grow by 3.5% in 2025, with 5.9% annual growth from 2026-2029. Major sectors supporting growth include electricity, oil, and gas.
data.description: A report on the Angola construction market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in Angola is projected to grow by 3.5% in real terms in 2025. It is anticipated to have an average annual growth rate of 5.9% from 2026 to 2029. This growth is supported by investments in sectors like electricity, oil, and gas. The report analyzes various segments including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets.
